21.reason: [The loop condition 'k < n - j' is invalid because 'j' is modified inside the inner loop and starts at 0, leading to undefined behavior and incorrect iteration bounds.]

22.reason: [The inner loop uses 'j' starting from 1 and accesses 'lines[k+j]', which may go out of bounds when 'k + j >= n'. Also, modifying 'j' here affects the outer loop condition incorrectly.]
